title: Battle of Roses
actors: Kuniko Miyake, Setsuko Wakayama, Yôko Katsuragi
plot: In Japan, after the death of Mr. Masago, her wife Satomi Masago loses the family's company "Lily Cosmetic" to Mr. Mogy due to huge amount of debts relative to withdraws of money from the company made by her husband. Mogy blackmail...
